framework.name: BlaBlaCar's Trust-as-Product Strategy
framework.description: BlaBlaCar built its entire business model around trust infrastructure rather than transaction facilitation. They force users to create detailed profiles, share personal information, and communicate before transactions — the platform IS the trust layer, not just a payment processor.
framework.raw_quote: blablacar's entire strategy is built around trust... users like to see and read the info but they are not willing to tell a lot of things about themselves... you need to make them understand why it's important
